cover.name: Al Green
cover.disambiguation: US soul singer, songwriter, pastor and record producer

song.name: Thank You for Sending Me an Angel
This Must Be the Place (Naive Melody)

setlist.info: During Naive Melody, David Byrne’s lamp was having technical problems. Angered by that and also the people who they were playing for, he stormed off the stage and did not return. Tom Tom Club performed the encore.

setlist.info: It is uncertain whether Houses In Motion was played between I Zimbra and Genius of Love but is missing from the tape or if the song wasn't played due to time constraints.
